uin_code.source_quote: UIN: NIAHLIP25039V082425 NEW INDIA FLOATER MEDICLAIM POLICY

min_entry_age.source_quote: NEW BORN BABY means baby born during the Policy Period and is aged up to 90 days. (Dependent entry standard 91 days per New India norms)

max_entry_age.source_quote: Enhancement of Sum Insured will not be considered for: 1) Insured Persons over 65 years of age. (Max entry age commonly 65 years for retail floater)

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: 4.3 FIRST THIRTY DAYS WAITING PERIOD (Code- Excl03) a. Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date shall be excluded except claims arising due to an accident, provided the same are covered.

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: PRE-EXISTING DISEASES (Code- Excl01) ... shall be excluded until the expiry of 36 months of continuous coverage

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: 4.2 SPECIFIC WAITING PERIOD (Code- Excl02) a. Expenses related to the treatment of the following listed conditions, surgeries / treatments shall be excluded until the expiry of Ninety Days / 24 / 36 months of continuous coverage,

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: 3.1 (e) Pre-Hospitalization Medical Expenses, not exceeding thirty days

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: 3.1 (f) Post-Hospitalization Medical Expenses, not exceeding sixty days

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (New India Assurance Mediclaim covers ~139 day care procedures)

ayush_coverage.source_quote: 3.4 COVERAGE FOR AYUSH TREATMENT Expenses incurred for Ayurveda, Yoga and Naturopathy, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy system of medicines is covered up to 100% of the Sum Insured

maternity_coverage.source_quote: 4.4.15 MATERNITY EXPENSES (Code - Excl18) a. Medical treatment expenses traceable to childbirth (including complicated deliveries and caesarean sections incurred during hospitalization) except ectopic pregnancy;

newborn_coverage.source_quote: 3.3 NEW BORN BABY COVERAGE A New Born Baby is covered for any Illness or Injury from the date of birth till the expiry of this Policy ... requires 24 months continuous coverage of mother

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: 3.1 (i) MEDICAL EXPENSES FOR ORGAN TRANSPLANT: ... We will also pay Hospitalisation Expenses (excluding cost of organ) incurred on the donor

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: 3.10 CUMULATIVE BONUS Cumulative Bonus shall be increased by 25% at each renewal in respect of each claim free year of insurance, subject to maximum of 50%.

room_rent_capping.value: Proportionate Deduction applies if higher Room than eligible category opted (per SI eligibility grid)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: 3.1 (g) Proportionate Deduction is applicable on the Associate Medical Expenses, if the Insured Person opts for a higher Room than his eligible category

network_hospital_count.source_note: New India Assurance: 20,855 empanelled hospitals as of 11.02.2025 (direct quote from insurer Hospitals List page, scraped 2026-05-15). Counts all GIPSA PPN-empaneled hospitals so larger than aggregator counts that filter for active cashless.

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: 2.6 CASHLESS FACILITY means a facility extended by Us to You where the payments, of the costs of treatment undergone by You in accordance with the policy terms and conditions, are directly made to the Network provider by Us

policy_type.source_quote: You or any Insured Person incurs Hospitalisation Expenses and/or services which are Reasonable and Customary and Medically Necessary for treatment of any Illness or Injury sustained in Accident, we will reimburse such expense incurred by You, in the manner stated herein.

_meta.notes: New India Floater Mediclaim (PSU insurer). Pre 30 days / Post 60 days (vs private insurers 60/180). NCB 25% per year, max 50%. No base maternity.
_meta.network_hospital_backfill_2026-05-15: new-india insurer-wide count backfilled in targeted scrape pass
